title: campanula graminifolia var. major
intro: Campanula graminifolia var. major, also known as the grass bellflower, is a perennial plant species in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Campanula graminifolia var. major include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used topically to treat wounds, skin conditions, and minor injuries.
